intent: Toggle button group — mutually exclusive or multi-select toggles (e.g., view modes: list/grid/board).

blacklist.description: Do not override styles matching pattern ^(ring-|outline-)
Do not override styles matching pattern ^h-

aiPrompt: Use ToggleGroup from @/components/starter. Use semantic props for variant and size. Do not hardcode colors or spacing. Colors must use design token classes only.
